description_long: This is a single-story Craftsman-style house with a prominent, wide front porch supported by square columns and a deep overhanging roof. The roof is a complex hip and gable combination, covered in dark gray shingles, and features a central gable above the porch. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding, with multiple symmetrically arranged windows on the sides. The front porch is partially enclosed with railings and has a set of steps leading up to the main entryway. The house's overall appearance is solid and inviting, with architectural details that emphasize horizontal lines and shelter.
description: A single-story Craftsman house with a wide front porch, dark shingled hip-and-gable roof, and symmetrical windows. The exterior features horizontal siding and prominent porch columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep porch, central gable, and supporting columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical row of windows and the extension of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the porch and the main roof structure visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with matching window arrangement and porch extension.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide covered porch with square columns, steps, and a central door under a gabled overhang
